reason: Verify only the promoted visual reference and validated DESIGN.md reach page generation and Asset Production remains suite-complete.
Verify old singular workspaces normalize once, candidate selection persists, and UI consumers do not fork recovery logic.
Verify candidate counts and cost are previewed, paid calls retain real approval/receipt boundaries, stale selection fails closed, and no unsupported external provider claim is added.
Verify every planned direction is deliberate and traceable while user constraints and reference identity remain intact.
Verify selection replacement after dependent output requires explicit invalidation/regeneration and never mixes source revisions.
Verify focused unit/E2E coverage, readable implementation, error handling, and repository quality gates.
Check implementation against the complete consumption map, candidate contract, promotion/token model, UX, compatibility, failure matrix, and rollback constraints.
